creator: spry@anarchy.in.the.ph
text:
Greetz,

     I've tried the patch above on FreeBSD/7.X. It works OK, but it
doesn't give me HSDPA speeds, only 3G. I know this because I have a
dual-boot system where my XP can go up to 1.XX Mbps speeds. I think
the NetBSD/OpenBSD drivers are worth looking/porting into.

     Thanks.

-- 
cheers
mars
